standard_dosage: 500 mg orally, once or twice daily with meals
absolute_contraindications: Acute or chronic metabolic acidosis, including diabetic ketoacidosis
Hypoxic conditions (e.g., cardiac or respiratory failure)
interaction_red_flags: Iodinated contrast media (risk of lactic acidosis)
missed_dose_rule: Take the missed dose as soon as you remember with food. If it is almost time for your next dose, skip the missed dose. Do not double the dose.

standard_dosage: Initial dose 5 mg orally once daily
absolute_contraindications: Hemodynamically unstable heart failure after acute myocardial infarction
missed_dose_rule: Take the missed dose as soon as you remember. If more than 12 hours have passed, skip the missed dose and return to your normal schedule.

absolute_contraindications: Active liver disease or unexplained persistent elevations of serum transaminases
Hypersensitivity to any component of this medication
interaction_red_flags: Large quantities of Grapefruit Juice (Significantly increases blood concentration)
missed_dose_rule: If it has been less than 12 hours since your missed dose, take it. Otherwise, skip the dose and wait until your next scheduled dose.

standard_dosage: 100 mg orally once daily (Enteric-coated, preferably on an empty stomach)
absolute_contraindications: Active peptic ulcer or gastrointestinal bleeding
interaction_red_flags: Anticoagulants such as Warfarin or Rivaroxaban (Extreme bleeding risk)
Ibuprofen/NSAIDs (May reduce cardioprotective effect of aspirin)
missed_dose_rule: Take the dose as soon as you remember on the same day. If you remember the next day, just take your regular dose. Never double the dose to prevent internal bleeding.
